name: PessoBot - Assistant Bar & Membres (v2 — Supabase driven)

parameters.query:
SELECT first_name, role FROM public.profiles WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.userId }}' LIMIT 1;
SELECT plan, status FROM public.subscriptions WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.body.userId }}' AND status = 'active' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT slug, name, category, price, calories, protein, description, pitch, ingredients, benefits, badges FROM public.v_pessobot_menu;
SELECT address, hours, contact FROM public.bar_settings WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 1;
